Streaming Data Settlement — Up to $50 Per Class Member

A streaming-service settlement has been reached over allegations that the company shared subscriber viewing data without consent. Eligible class members can claim up to $50 per class member without proof of purchase.

Deadline: October 4, 2027. Who qualifies: anyone with an active subscription in 2023.

No proof of purchase required to file. Just submit your name, address, and email to the claim form.
